user.title: Health Auto Export
user.description: Do you want to set up the Health Auto Export webhook?

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single configuration is possible.
abort.cloud_not_connected: Not connected to Home Assistant Cloud.
abort.webhook_not_internet_accessible: Your Home Assistant instance needs to be accessible to receive webhook messages.

create_entry.default:
In the Health Auto Export app, create a REST API automation for each data type you want to sync and point it to:

`{webhook_url}`

Use the JSON export format. See [the documentation]({docs_url}) for details.

init.title: Medication merges
init.description: Merge duplicate medications into one. Doses of the source are counted under the target (device, records and statistics).

data_description.source: Pick from known medications or type a name.
data_description.target: Where the source's doses should be counted.
